script:
一、剧情梗概

 Liana前世为了 Edric 放弃了自己身为舰队中将的身份，准备结婚后相夫教子，但是在订婚当天未婚夫却带来了他的“好兄弟”Lara，Lara口口声声自称自己和 Edric 就是“好兄弟”，并假借兄弟的名义和 Edric 进行各种的亲密互动，上一世的 Liana虽然对于Lara的越界行为十分不满，与她发生多次冲突，但是 Edric 始终站在Lara那边，并且多次指责 Liana。

后来 Liana家族出事，联邦总统将 Liana家族发配到荒芜星球，星舰却被Lara提前让人动了手脚，在前往荒芜星球时发生爆炸，死后， Liana重生在了订婚仪式这一天。

重来一世，她不再期待 Edric 的爱，决定揭穿Lara虚伪的面孔，重新回到了军队，并且和未婚夫成功退婚， Liana不但拿回了属于自己的荣誉，还成功挽救了家族被发配荒芜星球的命运。

人物小传

 Liana Aiden：重生前为联邦舰队中将，约二十七八岁，外貌端庄冷艳，气质沉稳中带着坚毅。她曾为爱情放弃事业，却在订婚当天被未婚夫与“好兄弟”Lara的暧昧背叛，家族遭陷害后死于星舰爆炸。重生后她彻底清醒，外表仍温柔得体，内心却冰冷果决，拥有强大的念动力和精神感应异能，行动冷静缜密，目标明确——夺回荣誉、守护家族、揭穿Lara，并彻底远离 Edric ，最终在Drake的真诚陪伴下重新拥抱属于自己的未来。

Lara Wayne：联邦军队校尉，约二十六岁，外表干练英气，常着劲装，言行粗犷豪放，实则心机深沉、善用“兄弟”之名行暧昧之实。她自幼暗恋 Edric ，不惜以兄弟身份长期贴近，对 Liana充满嫉妒与敌意，手段阴狠歹毒，曾试图借星舰爆炸和战场暗杀致 Liana于死地，最终因下药迷奸 Edric 被判十五年监禁，却在法庭上仍执迷不悟，疯狂诅咒 Liana。

Drake Nolan：联邦军队军官，约二十七八岁，身材高大挺拔，面容硬朗，眼神热忱而忠诚。他曾是 Liana的部下，性格直率勇敢，重情重义，对 Liana怀有多年暗恋却始终克制。在 Liana重生后，他是唯一始终信任并保护她的人，关键时刻驾驶战舰救她于炮火之下，并主动搜集Lara罪证，协助 Liana退婚，最终鼓起勇气表白，承诺等待，成为 Liana走出阴影后愿意接纳的新希望。

Edric Hawk：联邦军队中将，约三十岁，外表英俊威严，出身显赫，性格优柔寡断且情感迟钝。他表面深爱 Liana，却长期纵容Lara以“兄弟”之名越界亲近，在 Liana与Lara的冲突中屡屡偏袒后者，缺乏界限感与担当。被Lara下药后虽非主动出轨，但始终未能正视自身问题，直到 Liana退婚、Lara入狱才追悔莫及，却已彻底失去 Liana的信任与爱。

第一集

1-1星舰内部 日 内

人物： Liana，Irene，Ethan，NPC若干

△ Liana坐在星舰后面，双眼通红，看着外面浩瀚的星河眼泪流下来。

Liana: (V.O.) My name is Liana. Six months ago, my family was tried for leaking Federation secrets. My family and I were exiled to a desolate planet. But I knew we were innocent. No one believed me, not even my fiancé, Edric.

【闪回】

1-2  Edric 家楼下 日 外

人物： Liana， Edric ，Lara

△ Liana拦住了从别墅里出来的 Edric ，低声哀求。

Liana: (humbly) Edric, please believe me. My family never betrayed the Federation. Can you help me just this once and find out the truth?

Edric: (coldly shaking off Liana's hand) Enough, Liana. The evidence is conclusive. There's nothing left to argue. Your family betrayed the Federation.

Liana: (frantically waving her hands) No... no, that's not true...

△Lara从别墅里走了出来，很自然地挽上了 Edric 的手臂，一脸鄙夷地打断了 Liana的话。

Lara: Liana, you shouldn't be here. If anyone sees you, they'll think Edric is colluding with your family.

△ Liana看着他们亲密的模样，神情呆滞震惊地指着他们。

Liana: You... you two...

Lara: (looking at Edric, intimate) Darling, tell Liana about us. Now is the perfect time.

△ Edric 看了Lara一眼，眼神带着几分不忍，他扭过头，冷漠开口。

Edric: Liana, let's call off the engagement. I'm in love with Lara. Don't come looking for me again.

△说完，不顾 Liana悲伤又震惊的表情， Edric 直接离开了。

△ Liana下意识想要追上去，却被Lara拉了回来。

△Lara一巴掌打在 Liana脸上， Liana嘴角被打出血，整个人摔倒在地，Lara脸上笑容恶毒。

Lara: Stay away from Edric, or I'll kill you.

△Lara就要离开，却被 Liana抓住了裤脚。

△Lara低头看着 Liana，一脚踹在她身上， Liana死死不松手。

Liana: (weak and slurred) Tell me why. You said you and Edric were only old war buddies.

Lara: (with a cold laugh) If I hadn't said that, how could I have stayed by Edric's side?

△ Liana松开了手，Lara嘲讽一笑，直接离开，只剩下 Liana蜷缩着躺在地上。

Liana: (V.O.) That was when I realized Lara had been using the name of friendship to get close to Edric all along. But by then, it was too late.

【闪回结束】

接1-1剧情

△Lara睁开眼，飞船突然剧烈地晃动了一下，警报声突兀地响起，红色的警示灯疯狂闪烁。

Soldier: (O.S., terrified) The starship's power core is out of control! It's going to explode! Everyone--

△话音未落，更加剧烈的爆炸声从舱底传来，整艘星舰猛烈地倾斜。

△ Liana还没反应过来，她父母的身影已经扑了过来，用身体死死地挡在她面前。炽烈的火光撕碎了金属舱壁，灼热的气浪席卷而来。

Liana: (screaming) Father! Mother!

△火焰吞噬了父母的身影，他们的面容在 Liana眼前扭曲、燃烧、化为灰烬。 Liana被冲击波撞飞，半截身体卡在扭曲的金属残骸中，意识逐渐模糊。

【闪回】

1-3 星舰停靠处 日 外

人物： Liana、Lara

△ Liana上星舰前，忽然看到Lara人群中，嘴角勾出一个残忍的微笑，无声地动了动嘴唇。

Lara: (mouthing silently) You're dead.

【闪回结束】

接1-1剧情

△ Liana眼中迸发出滔天的恨意。

Liana: (hoarse, swearing an oath) It was you, Lara. You tampered with the starship! If I get another chance, I'll make you all pay in blood...

△ Liana在不甘中闭上了眼。

1-4 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅 日 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara

△柔和的交响乐声忽然涌入耳中，， Liana猛地睁开眼，发现自己正站在金碧辉煌的宴会厅中央,。

△她眼神茫然地环顾四周——宾客们笑容满面，觥筹交错。

Liana: (V.O., shocked) Isn't this the day of my engagement to Edric?

△ Liana僵硬地转过头， Edric 正微笑着朝她走来，而他的身边，正是穿着干练劲装，一脸傲慢的Lara。

Edric: (gentle) Sorry to keep you waiting, Liana. This is Lara, my old war buddy. I've told you about her.

【字幕： Liana  Liana的父亲Ethan  Liana的母亲Irene  Edric  Lara】

第二集

2-1 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅 日 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara

△Lara上前一步，熟稔地挽住 Edric 手臂，身体几乎贴在他身上。

Lara: (loudly) Hi, Liana! I'm rough around the edges and don't really get along with delicate little ladies. If I offend you later, don't take it personally!

△ Liana看着Lara亲密地贴着 Edric ，指尖攥紧酒杯。

Liana: (V.O.) Lara looks exactly the same as she did in my last life.

【闪回】

2-2  Edric 别墅客厅 夜 内

人物： Liana、Lara

△Lara穿着浴袍从 Edric 卧室走出，头发湿漉漉的。

Lara: (casual) Don't get the wrong idea, Liana. The water at my place was cut off, so I came to shower at my buddy's.

【闪回结束】

△ Liana压下翻涌的恨意，脸上依旧挂着得体微笑。

Liana: (stiff smile) Of course not.

Lara: (contemptuous, deliberately moving close to Edric to fix his collar tab) Your collar tab is crooked. Still so careless. I was always telling you that in the army.

△ Edric 神色尴尬，微微侧身。

Edric: (low voice) I can do it myself...

Lara: (patting his shoulder) Why so polite with me? We've been through life and death together!

△宾客纷纷侧目。 Liana看着 Edric 纵容的模样，强行压制住眼中的怒火。

Liana: (V.O., through clenched teeth) In my last life, I lost my temper on the spot. Then Lara called me jealous in front of everyone and made me humiliate myself at my own engagement banquet. This time, I won't fall for it.

△Lara挽住 Edric 手臂往酒台拖。

Lara: Come on, come on. Have a drink with me! Liana won't mind, right? I'll just borrow him for a bit.

△ Edric 回头看向 Liana，眼神为难。

Edric: (hesitating) I... I'll have one drink with her and come right back.

Liana: (with a faint smile) I don't mind. You two are so close. Of course I'm happy for you.

Lara: (surprised, then quickly smiling at Edric) See? I told you Liana was understanding. Not like those jealous girls who make a scene just because their fiancé has a female friend.

Liana: (V.O.) She said the same thing in my last life. Every time I showed discomfort with how intimate they were, Lara told everyone I wouldn't allow Edric to have female friends, that I was a jealous woman.

△ Edric 被Lara扯走， Liana独自站在原地。

Liana: (V.O., cold) Lara, you love pretending to be his buddy, don't you? Then I'll use your own words against you.

第三集

3-1 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅 日 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara、 Isabella 宾客若干

△宴会正式开始，Lara端着酒杯穿梭在人群中，动作豪放，笑声刺耳。

Lara: (loudly) I'm used to the army. I really don't fit in at events like this. Drinking with the guys is much more fun!

△她瞟了一眼远处优雅站立的 Liana，故意提高音量。

Lara: (to the people beside her) Not like some people, spending their whole lives as pampered heiresses in gilded cages, with no idea what real ability is.

△旁边几个宾客笑着附和。

Guest 1: (admiring) Lieutenant Lara really is different from other women.

Guest 2: I think only an outstanding woman like Miss Lara is worthy of Vice Admiral Hawk.

△Lara听到这些话，得意地看了 Liana一眼，故意大声道。

Lara: Don't talk nonsense. Edric and I are just old war buddies.

△ Isabella站在 Liana身边，一脸愤怒。

Isabella: Why does this Lara talk so strangely? And what's wrong with Edric? She's practically glued to him, and he doesn't even know to keep his distance!

Liana: (sarcastic) Maybe that's exactly what he likes.

△这时Lara从腰后抽出一柄手掌大小的银色锤子，在指尖转了一圈，走到 Liana面前。

Lara: (showing off loudly) This is my energy hammer. It's been with me for seven years. I can't count how many enemies I've crushed with it. Today, I'm giving it to you as an engagement gift for you and Edric.

Edric: (stepping forward, disapproving) No. That weapon has been with you for years. Take it back.

Lara: (boldly) It's fine. But a delicate noble lady like Liana probably can't even lift it, right?

△Lara把武器往前一递， Liana没有动。

Edric: (displeased) Liana, Lara is kindly giving you a gift. You should accept it.

Liana: (V.O., cold) Lara never meant to give me that energy hammer. She tampered with it. In my last life, it ruined my engagement banquet. But this time, I won't let her get what she wants.

△ Liana深吸一口气刚伸出手，Lara眼神一狠，锤子忽然剧烈震动，“嗖”地冲向半空，变得有半人高，能量纹路疯狂闪烁！

Guest A: (terrified) The energy hammer is out of control!

Guest B: (screaming) If it falls, it'll kill someone!

△众人惊慌后退。 Edric 脸色大变。

Edric: (urgent) Lara!

Lara（一脸镇定，大喊）大家别怕！有我在！

△她话没说完， Liana已经抬眸，眉心一道无形念力波动骤然扩散。能量锤在半空猛地顿住，悬停在众人头顶。下一秒，整柄锤子开始剧烈震颤，银色光芒迸发。

Lara: (panicked) What are you doing--

△ Liana眼神一冷，五指猛然攥紧。能量锤在所有人眼前发出“咔嚓”一声脆响，锤体寸寸碎裂，化作漫天银色碎屑，如流萤般飘散落下。宾客们捂嘴惊呼。

△Lara瞳孔骤缩，脸色瞬间惨白，后退两步跌坐在椅子上。

Lara: (trembling, in disbelief) My... my energy hammer... how could you--

Liana: (smiling, brow raised) Broken weapons should be replaced. Miss Lara, next time, remember to buy one that won't malfunction.

【字幕： Isabella】

第四集

4-1 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅 日 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara、 Isabella、宾客若干

△银色碎屑还在空中缓缓飘落。Lara握紧拳头，恨恨地看着 Liana。

Lara: (voice shaking) Do you know that hammer was the only keepsake my parents left me? How could you destroy it?

△ Edric 快步上前，眉头紧皱，拉住Lara的手臂护在身后，冷冷看向 Liana。

Edric: (pained) Liana, you've gone too far. Apologize to Lara right now.

△宾客们窃窃私语，目光齐刷刷落在 Liana身上。 Isabella一步跨上前，挡在 Liana面前。

Isabella: (with a cold laugh) Apologize for what? Everyone heard Miss Lara say it herself. She gave the hammer to Liana as an engagement gift. Once something is given away, what Liana does with it is none of your business.

Lara: (choking up) I--

Isabella: (cutting in, louder) If it was her parents' keepsake, she should've kept it locked away. If Liana hadn't acted, that hammer could've hurt someone. Instead of thanking her, you're demanding an apology?

△ Edric 张了张嘴，一个字反驳不出。Lara咬着嘴唇，眼泪在眼眶里打转。

Lara: (aggrieved, tugging Edric's sleeve) Forget it, Edric... Liana didn't mean it... I don't mind...

△ Edric 皱着眉，看向 Liana。

Edric: Liana, is that what you think too?

△ Isabella翻了个白眼， Liana上前一步将她拉到身后，语气平淡。

Liana: I think Isabella is right. That hammer was probably just too old. If Lara really likes it that much, I can have someone custom-make a new one for her.

Edric: That's not the same--

Liana: (smirking) I don't think Lara is the kind of person who would make a fuss over something so small.

Lara: (through clenched teeth, forcing a smile) Of course. This was my fault to begin with.

Lara: (V.O.) That bitch Liana dared to destroy my hammer. Sooner or later, I'll make her pay.

Liana: (gentle) Miss Lara is so understanding. Since the hammer matter is settled, everyone should take your seats. Let's not delay the main event over such a small thing.

△她转头招呼宾客， Isabella立刻会意地招呼众人往宴席走。Lara吸了吸鼻子，抹掉眼泪，刚想往 Edric 身边的位置走， Liana却笑着拦住了她。

Liana: (smiling, pointing to another round table) Miss Lara, this is where you should sit.

Lara: (stunned) What?

Liana: (sharp-eyed, smiling) Since you're Edric's war buddy, you should sit with his fellow officers. You'll be freer drinking and catching up with them. The main table is for female relatives and elders, so I was afraid you wouldn't be comfortable here.

△Lara顺着 Liana手指的方向看去，那一桌全是男人。

第五集

5-1 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅 日 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara、 Isabella、宾客若干

△Lara站在原地，攥紧拳头，脸色难看地看向那桌粗犷的军官。

Lara: (forcing a smile) Liana, it may not be appropriate for me to sit with the guys... After all, I'm a woman, sitting with all those men...

Liana: (smiling gently) Why would it be inappropriate? Didn't you say you don't get along with delicate girls and prefer drinking with the guys? Edric's fellow officers are all here today. It's the perfect chance to catch up.

△ Isabella在旁边捂着嘴偷笑。Lara咬着唇，看向 Edric ，眼神带着求助。

Edric: (hesitating) Maybe Lara should sit at the main table...

Liana: (smiling at Edric) What? Were you two lying before? Isn't Lara your war buddy?

△Lara被堵得哑口无言，周围宾客都看着这一幕，她只能死死咬着牙。

Lara: (forcing a smile) Liana is right. I'll sit with the guys.

△她转身走向兄弟桌，每一步都走得僵硬。 Liana看着她的背影，唇角勾起一抹冷笑。

5-2 星际酒店·宴会厅门口 夜 外

人物： Liana、 Isabella

△宴会结束，宾客陆续乘坐着飞行器离场。 Isabella陪 Liana站在门口。

Isabella: (frowning) Where is Edric? His fiancée is waiting here. Where did he go?

△话音刚落，她们看见 Edric 搀着Lara从侧门出来。Lara整个人挂在他身上，脸埋在他肩头，一副不省人事的样子。

Lara: (mumbling) Edric... take me home... I feel terrible...

Edric: (looking up at Liana, troubled) Liana, Lara drank too much. I don't feel safe letting her go home alone... I'll take her first, and you...

Liana: (ice-cold) Edric, don't forget this was our engagement ceremony today. You're taking another woman home. Did you ever consider how I feel?

Edric: (frowning) Liana, when did you become so unreasonable? Lara and I are just old war buddies. Don't overthink it.△说完， Edric 直接带着Lara离开了，Lara回头看了一眼 Liana，嘴角在 Edric 看不到的地方，勾起一丝得意的笑。

△ Isabella气得跺脚。

Isabella: (angry) What does he mean? Is some random buddy more important than you?

△ Liana站在原地，浑身僵硬，面色冰冷。

Liana: (V.O.) Edric, since you care so much about Lara, I'll give you to her in this life.

第六集

6-1  Liana卧室 夜 内

人物： Liana Admiral Philip（全息投影）

△ Liana站在落地窗前，窗外是科幻感十足的星际都市，飞行器拖着光尾穿梭在高楼之间。她穿着睡袍，目光冰冷地望着窗外。

Liana: (V.O., calm) The engagement banquet ended. Just like in my last life, Edric stayed by Lara's side. Only this time, I no longer expected anything from him.

△她走到床头柜前，拿起一枚订婚戒指，在指尖转了转。

Liana: (V.O.) I have to end this engagement. But right now, Lara and Edric haven't openly crossed the line. If all I have is their ambiguous 'friendship,' it won't be enough.

【闪回】

6-2  Edric 别墅客厅 夜 内

人物： Liana、 Edric 、Lara

△前世，Lara穿着 Edric 的衬衫从卧室走出来， Edric 跟在她身后，神色自然到像是早已习惯这样的早晨。

Lara: (casual) Why is Liana here? Edric and I talked tactics too late last night, so I slept on the sofa.

△ Edric 端了杯咖啡递给Lara，目光温柔得像在看恋人。

【闪回结束】

接6-1剧情

△ Liana攥紧戒指，深吸一口气。

Liana: (V.O., cold and firm) I have the memories of my last life, but in this life they haven't gone that far yet. I have to catch proof that they're crossing the line and let everyone see Lara's hypocrisy.

△手腕上的通讯器忽然亮起，一道全息影像投射在半空——是她的老上司，Admiral Philip。

Admiral Philip: (hologram, grave) Liana, I have to ask you one more time. Are you truly giving up your duty in the military for a family life?

Liana: (firm) Admiral Philip, I'll come to the base tomorrow and speak with you about this in person.

Admiral Philip: (hologram, sighing) All right. I'll be waiting.

△全息影像消失。 Liana站在窗前，眼神终于有了温度。

Liana: (V.O.) In my last life, I gave up everything for Edric. In this life... I'm taking back what belongs to me.

6-3 军事基地·大厅 日 内

人物： Liana、Lara、Lara的朋友

△第二天， Liana身着便服走进军事基地大厅，她正准备往电梯方向走，迎面碰上了穿着军装的Lara。

△Lara看到 Liana，先是愣了一下，语气有些惊讶。

Lara: Liana, what are you doing here?

第七集

7-1 军事基地·大厅 日 内

40-1 军部·军事法庭外走廊 日 内人物： Liana、 Edric 、Drake

△ Liana走出法庭大门，沿着走廊往出口方向走。Drake跟在她身侧，正要说什么，身后忽然传来急促的脚步声。

Edric: (panting, pleading) Liana! Wait!

△ Liana停下脚步，但没有转身。 Edric 几步追上来，伸手想抓她的手腕，却被她侧身避开。

Edric: (voice trembling, eyes red) Liana... Lara set me up! I knew nothing that night... You know it. From beginning to end, the only person I loved was you! Please don't end the engagement...

Liana: (finally turning back, gaze calm) Edric, do you think that because you were drugged, you did nothing wrong at all?

△ Edric 愣住了，嘴唇动了动。

Liana: (continuing, cold and clear) You indulged Lara for years. In the name of friendship, you let her cross every line: flirting, clinging to you, coming and going with you. Why did she think she had a chance? Because you never drew a clear line.

△ Edric 脸色惨白，喉结滚动，想说什么却发不出声。

Liana: (decisive) Lara is guilty, but you are not innocent.

△ Edric 不死心，还想上前一步。Drake侧身一步，稳稳挡在 Liana面前，目光冷淡地看着 Edric 。

Drake: (low) Vice Admiral Hawk, this ends here. Please don't bother Liana again.

Edric: (through clenched teeth, glaring at Drake) What right do you have to interfere in our affairs? What exactly are you to Liana?

△ Liana从Drake身后走出来，站到Drake身边，抬手自然地挽住了Drake的手臂。Drake身体微微一僵，随即嘴角压不住地往上扬。

Liana: (looking at Edric, faint smile) He's my future boyfriend. Does that answer satisfy you?

△ Edric 瞳孔骤缩，脸色煞白。
synopsis: Liana前世是联邦舰队中将，为未婚夫Edric放弃事业，却在订婚当天遭遇Edric的“好兄弟”Lara的暧昧背叛。Lara以兄弟之名与Edric亲密互动，Liana多次冲突反被指责。家族遭陷害后，Liana被流放荒芜星球，星舰被Lara动手脚爆炸身亡。重生回订婚仪式当天，Liana不再期待Edric的爱，决心揭穿Lara真面目。她重回军队，利用前世记忆和念动力异能，在比试中击败Lara，并逐步收集证据。Edric始终偏袒Lara，甚至在Lara下药后与其发生关系。Liana在Drake帮助下，成功退婚，并将Lara送上军事法庭，判处十五年监禁。最终，Liana挽救了家族命运，并与一直暗恋她的Drake开启新感情。
synopsisEn: In her past life, Liana, a Fleet Vice Admiral, gave up her career for her fiancé Edric. On their engagement day, Edric's 'best buddy' Lara crossed boundaries with him under the guise of friendship. Liana's protests were dismissed, and her family was framed and exiled. The starship was sabotaged by Lara, killing Liana. Reborn on the engagement day, Liana no longer loves Edric and vows to expose Lara. She returns to the military, uses her telekinesis to defeat Lara in a duel, and gathers evidence. Edric continues to favor Lara, even sleeping with her after being drugged. With Drake's help, Liana breaks off the engagement and sends Lara to prison for 15 years. She saves her family and starts a new relationship with Drake.
targetAudience: 欧美 AI 短剧制作流程：面向欧美女性短剧观众，优先提取可直接用于 AI 生图和视频制作的人物、服装、场景、道具与关键镜头资产。

characters.name: Liana Aiden（莉安娜·艾登）
characters.description: 联邦舰队前任中将，重生后约二十七八岁。外貌端庄冷艳，五官精致立体，皮肤白皙，气质沉稳中带着坚毅。金色长发通常盘起或披散，眼神锐利而冷静。拥有强大的念动力和精神感应异能。重生后内心冰冷果决，外表温柔得体。常着军装或干练便装。

outfits.name: 订婚宴礼服
outfits.description: 优雅的深蓝色露肩长裙，剪裁合体，搭配银色耳饰和手链，脚穿细跟高跟鞋。

outfits.name: 战斗服
outfits.description: 黑色紧身作战服，材质具有防护功能，贴合身形，腰间有战术腰带，脚穿军靴。

outfits.name: 日常便服
outfits.description: 白色衬衫搭配黑色长裤，外穿深灰色风衣，简约利落。

outfits.name: 睡衣
outfits.description: 丝质深紫色睡袍，领口微敞，腰带松松系着。

characters.name: Lara Wayne（拉拉·韦恩）
characters.description: 联邦军队校尉，约二十六岁。外表干练英气，短发利落，五官硬朗，肤色健康，身材健美。言行粗犷豪放，实则心机深沉、善用‘兄弟’之名行暧昧之实。常着劲装或军装，偶尔穿裙装但显得不自在。对Edric有执念，嫉妒心强，手段阴狠。

outfits.name: 军装
outfits.description: 联邦标准深绿色军装，肩章显示校尉军衔，腰间佩带能量锤，脚穿军靴。

outfits.name: 便装
outfits.description: 黑色T恤搭配迷彩裤，外套夹克，风格粗犷随意。

outfits.name: 裙装
outfits.description: 修身白色连衣裙，但她穿着很不自在，动作僵硬。

outfits.name: 睡衣/浴袍
outfits.description: 白色浴袍，头发湿漉漉的，从Edric卧室走出。

characters.name: Drake Nolan（德雷克·诺兰）
characters.description: 联邦军队军官，约二十七八岁。身材高大挺拔，面容硬朗，眼神热忱而忠诚。黑色短发，常穿黑色作战服或军装。性格直率勇敢，重情重义，对Liana怀有多年暗恋却始终克制。是Liana重生后唯一始终信任并保护她的人。

outfits.name: 军装
outfits.description: 联邦标准深蓝色军装，肩章显示军官军衔，笔挺合身。

outfits.name: 作战服
outfits.description: 黑色战术作战服，配备轻型护甲和多功能腰带，脚穿军靴。

outfits.name: 便装
outfits.description: 深灰色夹克内搭白色T恤，下穿深色牛仔裤，休闲但干练。

characters.name: Edric Hawk（埃德里克·霍克）
characters.description: 联邦军队中将，约三十岁。外表英俊威严，金棕色短发，五官深邃，身材高大。出身显赫，性格优柔寡断且情感迟钝。常穿军装或正装。表面深爱Liana，却长期纵容Lara越界，缺乏界限感与担当。

outfits.name: 军装
outfits.description: 联邦白色军装，金色肩章显示中将军衔，胸前有勋章，笔挺高贵。

outfits.name: 订婚宴正装
outfits.description: 深灰色三件套西装，白色衬衫，银色领带，皮鞋锃亮。

outfits.name: 便装
outfits.description: 黑色高领毛衣搭配深色长裤，外套深棕色皮夹克。

characters.name: Isabella（伊莎贝拉）
characters.description: Liana的朋友，在订婚宴上为Liana出头，性格直爽仗义。外貌年轻，深色卷发，常穿时尚裙装。

characters.name: Admiral Philip（菲利普上将）
characters.description: Liana的老上司，联邦海军上将，年长男性，头发花白，面容严肃但温和。支持Liana重返军队。

characters.name: Ethan Aiden（伊桑·艾登）
characters.description: Liana的父亲，联邦研究员，中年男性，戴眼镜，气质儒雅。在闪回中短暂出现。

characters.name: Irene Aiden（艾琳·艾登）
characters.description: Liana的母亲，联邦研究员，中年女性，面容温柔。在闪回中短暂出现。

characters.name: Lara's Friend A（拉拉的朋友A）
characters.description: Lara的军官朋友之一，女性，对Liana态度轻蔑。

characters.name: Lara's Friend B（拉拉的朋友B）
characters.description: Lara的军官朋友之一，女性，附和Lara贬低Liana。

characters.name: Pirate Leader（海盗首领）
characters.description: 星际海盗首领，独眼，满脸伤疤，声音粗哑。指挥海盗袭击城市。

scenes.name: 星舰内部
scenes.description: 一艘联邦星舰的内部，金属舱壁，红色警示灯闪烁，警报声刺耳。Liana坐在后排座位，透过舷窗可见浩瀚星河。后发生爆炸，火光、浓烟、扭曲的金属。

scenes.name: Edric家楼下
scenes.description: 一栋豪华别墅前的街道，科幻风格的建筑，飞行器停靠区。Liana在此哀求Edric，被Lara打断并打倒在地。

scenes.name: 星际酒店·订婚宴会厅
scenes.description: 金碧辉煌的宴会厅，水晶吊灯，长桌铺着白色桌布，摆满精致餐具和鲜花。宾客们穿着礼服，觥筹交错。中央有舞池和乐队。整体氛围奢华浪漫。

scenes.name: Edric别墅客厅
scenes.description: 现代风格的客厅，沙发、茶几、全息电视。Lara曾穿着浴袍从卧室走出，场景暗示亲密。

scenes.name: 军事基地·大厅
scenes.description: 军事基地的入口大厅，高挑空间，金属质感，全息显示屏，来往军人。Liana与Lara在此相遇并约战。

scenes.name: 军事基地·比试场
scenes.description: 巨大的圆形金属擂台，周围环绕全息防护屏障。上方有照明灯，四周是阶梯式观众席。地面有能量纹路。Liana与Lara在此对决。

scenes.name: Admiral Philip办公室
scenes.description: 简洁的办公室，金属办公桌，全息屏幕，书架上有实体书。落地窗可见军事基地全景。

scenes.name: 军事基地·走廊
scenes.description: 军事基地内部的走廊，金属墙壁，灯光冷白，偶尔有军人经过。Drake在此追上Liana。

scenes.name: 飞行器内部
scenes.description: 小型民用飞行器驾驶舱，两个座位，仪表盘发光，窗外是星际都市的天际线。氛围私密。

scenes.name: Liana家楼下
scenes.description: 高层住宅楼前的空地，飞行器起降坪。背景是科幻城市的高楼大厦。Liana与Edric曾在此争执。

scenes.name: Liana卧室
scenes.description: Liana的私人卧室，落地窗，窗外是星际都市夜景。床头柜上有订婚戒指。风格简约优雅。

scenes.name: 星际基地·医疗室
scenes.description: 医疗室内部，白色墙壁，病床，医疗仪器，窗外可见基地内部。Lara曾在此住院，Liana也在此养伤。

scenes.name: 战舰研发中心
scenes.description: 巨大的研发大厅，中央悬浮着一艘银白色新型战舰，周围环绕全息扫描光幕。技术人员在操作台忙碌。

scenes.name: 星光餐厅
scenes.description: 城市最高处的旋转景观餐厅，全透明穹顶，可俯瞰星际都市天际线。内部装潢现代奢华，灯光柔和。Liana与Lara在此谈判。

scenes.name: 星际城市·街道
scenes.description: 被海盗袭击后的城市街道，冲天火光，高楼崩塌，飞行器坠落，碎石残骸遍布。人群尖叫奔逃。一艘海盗星舰悬停低空，炮口充能。

scenes.name: Lara家
scenes.description: Lara的住所，现代风格，客厅有沙发、餐桌、酒柜。卧室有床和衣柜。整体色调偏冷。Lara在此下药并引诱Edric。

scenes.name: 餐厅（Liana与Drake用餐）
scenes.description: 一家格调优雅的餐厅，柔和灯光，精致餐具，窗外有城市夜景。Liana与Drake共进晚餐。

scenes.name: Liana家·客厅
scenes.description: Liana家中的客厅，现代家具，全息通讯设备。Liana与父母通过全息影像通话。

scenes.name: 军部·军事法庭外走廊
scenes.description: 军事法庭外的走廊，灰色墙壁，冷白灯光，空旷寂静。Lara被法警押送，Edric与Lara在此对话。

scenes.name: 军部·军事法庭大厅
scenes.description: 庄严肃穆的法庭，高挑天花板，法官席高坐，两侧陪审席，中央被告席和原告席。整体色调深色，氛围压抑。

props.name: 能量锤
props.description: Lara的标志性武器，手掌大小，银色金属材质，可变形放大。锤体有能量纹路，攻击时震动发光。后被Liana用念力摧毁。

props.name: 订婚戒指
props.description: Edric送给Liana的订婚戒指，银色金属环，镶嵌蓝色宝石。在Liana卧室床头柜出现。

props.name: 全息通讯器
props.description: 手腕佩戴的设备，可投射全息影像和消息。剧中人物多次使用。

props.name: 电子镣铐
props.description: 灰色金属材质，戴在犯人手腕上，有电子锁。Lara在法庭上佩戴。

props.name: 星舰（Star Falcon-class）
props.description: 联邦新型战舰，流线型银白色，悬浮在研发中心检测台上。Drake曾驾驶它救Liana。

props.name: 海盗星舰
props.description: 黑色涂装，巨型，炮口发光。低空掠过城市，发动袭击。

props.name: 酒杯/酒瓶
props.description: 普通玻璃酒杯和酒瓶，Lara用其下药。

props.name: 催情药
props.description: Lara从暗网购买的药物，用于迷奸Edric。未明确描述外观，但可想象为小瓶液体或药丸。

props.name: 能量屏障（念力）
props.description: Liana的念力形成的透明屏障，无形但有视觉扭曲效果，可抵挡攻击。

props.name: 全息影像记录芯片
props.description: 小型芯片，存储Drake战舰记录的画面，作为证据提交法庭。
